lines.english: Some collect hundreds of thousands of dollars,
but in the end, the pitcher of the body bursts. ||3||
By Your Power, You have set this false contrivance in motion. ||2||
will be destroyed in an instant - you are so egotistical. ||4||1||9||60||
Says Kabeer, that single foundation which you have laid
Gauree:
So should you meditate on the Lord, O my soul. ||1||
Just as Dhroo and Prahlaad meditated on the Lord,
O Lord, Merciful to the meek, I have placed my faith in You;
along with all my family, I have come aboard Your boat. ||1||Pause||
He causes this boat to cross over. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮਨਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tis bhaavai taa hukam manaavai |
lines.english: When it is pleasing to Him, then He inspires us to obey the Hukam of His Command.
my comings and goings in reincarnation have ended. ||3||
By Guru's Grace, such understanding is infused into me;
Says Kabeer, meditate, vibrate upon the Lord, the Sustainer of the earth.
Gauree 9:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਨਿ ਛਾਡਿ ਜਉ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: jon chhaadd jau jag meh aaeo |
lines.english: He leaves the womb, and comes into the world;
In this world, in the world beyond and everywhere, He alone is the Giver. ||4||2||10||61||
as soon as the air touches him, he forgets his Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨਾ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeearaa har ke gunaa gaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O my soul, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
After wandering through 8.4 million incarnations, you came.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨਿ ਮਹਿ ਉਰਧ ਤਪੁ ਕਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: garabh jon meh uradh tap karataa |
lines.english: You were upside-down, living in the womb; you generated the intense meditative heat of 'tapas'.
Then, you escaped the fire of the belly. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਕੇ ਛੁਟਕੇ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਠਾਇਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ab ke chhuttake tthaur na tthaaeo |3|
lines.english: If you stumble and fall now, you shall find no home or place of rest. ||3||
Says Kabeer, meditate, vibrate upon the Lord, the Sustainer of the earth.
He is not seen to be coming or going; He is the Knower of all. ||4||1||11||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਗ ਬਾਸੁ ਨ ਬਾਛੀਐ ਡਰੀਐ ਨ ਨਰਕਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: surag baas na baachheeai ddareeai na narak nivaas |
lines.english: Don't wish for a home in heaven, and don't be afraid to live in hell.
Gauree Poorbee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਨਾ ਹੈ ਸੋ ਹੋਈ ਹੈ ਮਨਹਿ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ਆਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: honaa hai so hoee hai maneh na keejai aas |1|
lines.english: Whatever will be will be, so don't get your hopes up in your mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਪਰਮ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa te paaeeai param nidhaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: from whom the most excellent treasure is obtained. ||1||Pause||
Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਨੀਐ ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jab lag jugat na jaaneeai bhaau bhagat bhagavaan |2|
lines.english: unless you know the way to worship the Lord God with loving devotion? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਜਪੁ ਕਿਆ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੋ ਕਿਆ ਬਰਤੁ ਕਿਆ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa jap kiaa tap sanjamo kiaa barat kiaa isanaan |
lines.english: What good is chanting, penance or self-mortification? What good is fasting or cleansing baths,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਸੰਪੈ ਤਿਉ ਬਿਪਤਿ ਹੈ ਬਿਧ ਨੇ ਰਚਿਆ ਸੋ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jiau sanpai tiau bipat hai bidh ne rachiaa so hoe |3|
lines.english: As is wealth, so is adversity; whatever the Lord proposes, comes to pass. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਪੈ ਦੇਖਿ ਨ ਹਰਖੀਐ ਬਿਪਤਿ ਦੇਖਿ ਨ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sanpai dekh na harakheeai bipat dekh na roe |
lines.english: Don't feel so delighted at the sight of wealth, and don't weep at the sight of suffering and adversity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸੋ ਸੇਵਾ ਭਲੇ ਜਿਹ ਘਟ ਬਸੈ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੨॥੬੩॥
lines.translit: sevak so sevaa bhale jih ghatt basai muraar |4|1|12|63|
lines.english: that servant performs the best service, whose heart is filled with the Lord. ||4||1||12||63||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਅਬ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਸੰਤਨ ਰਿਦੈ ਮਝਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer ab jaaniaa santan ridai majhaar |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, now I know that the Lord dwells within the hearts of His Saints;
Gauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਤੇਰੋ ਕੋਇ ਨਹੀ ਖਿੰਚਿ ਲੇਇ ਜਿਨਿ ਭਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: re man tero koe nahee khinch lee jin bhaar |
lines.english: O my mind, even if you carry someone's burden, they don't belong to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਖ ਬਸੇਰੋ ਪੰਖਿ ਕੋ ਤੈਸੋ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: birakh basero pankh ko taiso ihu sansaar |1|
lines.english: This world is like the perch of the bird on the tree. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਰਸ ਬਿਸਰਿ ਗਏ ਰਸ ਅਉਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jih ras bisar ge ras aaur |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With the taste of this essence, I have forgotten all other tastes. ||1||Pause||
I drink in the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਰ ਮੁਏ ਕਿਆ ਰੋਈਐ ਜਉ ਆਪਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਨ ਰਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aaur mue kiaa roeeai jau aapaa thir na rahaae |
lines.english: Why should we weep at the death of others, when we ourselves are not permanent?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਉਪਜੈ ਸੋ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਹੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਰਿ ਰੋਵੈ ਬਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo upajai so binas hai dukh kar rovai balaae |2|
lines.english: Whoever is born shall pass away; why should we cry out in grief? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਚਿਤਿ ਚੇਤਿਆ ਰਾਮ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਬੈਰਾਗ ॥੩॥੨॥੧੩॥੬੪॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer chit chetiaa raam simar bairaag |3|2|13|64|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, my consciousness is filled with thoughts of remembrance of the Lord; I have become detached from the world. ||3||2||13||64||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਕੀ ਉਪਜੀ ਤਹ ਰਚੀ ਪੀਵਤ ਮਰਦਨ ਲਾਗ ॥
lines.translit: jeh kee upajee teh rachee peevat maradan laag |
lines.english: We are re-absorbed into the One from whom we came; drink in the Lord's essence, and remain attached to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਥੁ ਨਿਹਾਰੈ ਕਾਮਨੀ ਲੋਚਨ ਭਰੀ ਲੇ ਉਸਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: panth nihaarai kaamanee lochan bharee le usaasaa |
lines.english: The bride gazes at the path, and sighs with tearful eyes.
Raag Gauree:
